failedAssertions.reason: The Curve result card does not render an 'Approve' button when no wallet is connected because the Curve API only returns approval data (approval_target, approval_calldata) when a sender address is provided in the request. Without a wallet, no sender is sent, so approval fields are empty, and only the Swap button is shown. The auto-connect mechanism works correctly for Swap on Curve cards (verified), but the specific 'auto-approve' flow described in this assertion is not possible for Curve results without a prior wallet connection. This is a chicken-and-egg design gap: the assertion requires clicking Approve without a wallet, but the Approve button requires wallet-derived sender data to appear.
